title: rosa × centifolia var. cristata
intro: Rosa × centifolia var. cristata, also known as the creeping moss rose, is a low-growing, spreading variety of the old rose or centifolia rose, characterized by its compact growth habit and delicate, moss-like foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Rosa × centifolia var. cristata include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality and reduce inflammation. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
